|discord=https://discord.com/invite/6xgTW9F64G |previous=Upthrust Esports/Survivors Saga/Season 2{{!}}Season 2 |next= }} '''Upthrust Survivors Saga''' is an event organised by '''Upthrust Esports''' for professional teams in {{Flag|in}} India. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentators|lang=in |b1=Insane Arena |b2=Gamezotech |b3=SardarjiYT |b4=Aman |b4name=Aman Rawat }} ===Format=== * '''Quarter Finals:''''' ** 32 teams. *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|24 teams}} directly invited *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|8 teams}} from Open Qualifiers. ** Teams are divided equally into 2 groups of 16. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 6 teams}} from each group qualify for the ''Semi Finals. * '''Semi Finals''' : ''December 29th - December 30th, 2023 ** 24 teams. *** 12 invited teams. *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|12 teams}} from Quarter Finals. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** 12 matches (6 each day). ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Grand Finals''. * '''Grand Finals''' : ''January 2nd - 5th, 2024 ** 16 teams. ** 4 matchdays. ** 24 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|prizesummary=false |{{Slot |localprize=0 |{{Opponent|team
